electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Quiescent current, Operating at ULQ mode

electrical_characteristics.conditions: VOUT = 5V, continuous mode operation, TJ=-40°C to 150°C

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Reverse current limit for FCCM Mode
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Reverse current limit for FCCM Mode

pin_definitions.description: Enable input control. Driving EN high or leaving this pin floating enables the converter. A resistor divider can be used to imply an UVLO function.
Output feedback. Connect FB to the tap of an external resistor divider from the output to GND to set the output voltage.
Ground of internal analog circuitry. Connect AGND to PGND plane at a single point.
Open Drain Power Good Indicator, it is asserted low if output voltage is out of PG threshold due to over-voltage, under-voltage, thermal shutdown, EN shutdown or during soft-start.
Not Connected, keep this pin floating.
Switching node terminal. Connect the output inductor to this pin with wide and short tracks
Supply input for the gate drive voltage of the high-side MOSFET. Connect a 0.1-µF bootstrap capacitor between BOOT and SW.
Input voltage supply pin. Drain terminal of high-side MOSFET. Connect the input decoupling capacitors between VIN and GND.
Power GND terminal. Source terminal of low side MOSFET.
Operation mode selection pin. Leaving this pin floating(≥500 kΩ) forces the TPS56637 into FCCM. Connecting this pin to GND(≤10 kΩ) forces the TPS56637 into Eco-mode™ under light load.

logical_pins.name: EN
logical_pins.description: Enable input control. Driving EN high or leaving this pin floating enables the converter. A resistor divider can be used to imply an UVLO function.

logical_pins.name: FB
logical_pins.description: Output feedback. Connect FB to the tap of an external resistor divider from the output to GND to set the output voltage.

logical_pins.name: AGND
logical_pins.description: Ground of internal analog circuitry. Connect AGND to PGND plane at a single point.

logical_pins.name: PG
logical_pins.description: Open Drain Power Good Indicator, it is asserted low if output voltage is out of PG threshold due to over-voltage, under-voltage, thermal shutdown, EN shutdown or during soft-start.

logical_pins.name: NC
logical_pins.description: Not Connected, keep this pin floating.

logical_pins.name: SW
logical_pins.description: Switching node terminal. Connect the output inductor to this pin with wide and short tracks

logical_pins.name: BOOT
logical_pins.description: Supply input for the gate drive voltage of the high-side MOSFET. Connect a 0.1-μF bootstrap capacitor between BOOT and SW.

logical_pins.name: VIN
logical_pins.description: Input voltage supply pin. Drain terminal of high-side MOSFET. Connect the input decoupling capacitors between VIN and GND.

logical_pins.name: PGND
logical_pins.description: Power GND terminal. Source terminal of low side MOSFET.

logical_pins.name: MODE
logical_pins.description: Operation mode selection pin. Leaving this pin floating(≥500 kΩ) forces the TPS56637 into FCCM. Connecting this pin to GND(≤10 kΩ) forces the TPS56637 into Eco-mode™ under light load.
